title: U.S. Department of Energy Releases First-Ever Blueprint for a Clean and Competitive Industrial Sector
content:
The U.S. Department of Energy and White House OSTP released The National Blueprint for a Clean & Competitive Industrial Sector, outlining five strategies to transform U.S. manufacturing, which contributes 12% to GDP and accounts for 20% of U.S. annual greenhouse gas emissions.
The Blueprint focuses on deploying cost-effective, low-carbon solutions; scaling emerging technologies to de-risk adoption; leveraging data to improve efficiency and track progress; advancing transformative research for deep emissions cuts; and reducing embodied emissions across product life cycles. It emphasizes investments in low-carbon technologies to enhance competitiveness as global markets adopt clean energy innovations.
author: Analysts Account
